sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 51 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.53/2018. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.2733/2018. 26.01.2026 Mr. Pervaiz Ahmad Memon, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Fouz Khalid Khan, Commissioner Inland Revenue, CTO, Karachi, is present and does not press the reference application and states that the same may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
